creator: charlz_klug@mail.ru
text:
I install FreeBSD 8.0 i386 and
build Sams, it's successfully compiled and installed. By default, using
PHP 5.3. I assume you previously install PHP 5.4
from /usr/ports/lang/php5. With best regards, Imil.
